message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title New User Workflow

actor "User" as user
rectangle "uFR Nano" {
    participant "NFC" as nfc
}
rectangle "Raspberry Pi" {
    participant "WebInterface" as web
    participant "PiPass" as pipass
    database "DB" as db
}

alt [Tap First Example]
    user -> nfc : 1 Tap
    pipass -> nfc : 2 Polling Service
    nfc -> pipass : 3 Ack Tap
    pipass -> db : 4 User Lookup
    db -> pipass : 5 Zero Results
    pipass -> pipass : 6 Set user state to new.\nAwait WebInterface interaction.
    user -> web : 7 Complete Registration Workflow
else [Web Create]
    user -> web : 8 Start Registration Workflow
    web -> pipass : 9 Save registration.\nAwait next unassigned tap.
    nfc -> pipass : 10 Ack Tap
    pipass -> db : 11 User Lookup
    db -> pipass : 12 Zero Results
    pipass -> pipass : 13 Complete Registration
    pipass -> db : 14 Save user details
    pipass -> web : 15 Ack user registration
    web -> user : 16 Confirm
end

@enduml
```
